zh.Witton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德維頓 小絲
zh.Felton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓
zh.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh.Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾巴福斯 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Atholl於大約1350年出生在英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓時，她的父親Sir Adomar Strathbogie40歲，母親Mary15歲。她於1372年5月6日之前與Sir Ralph Eure在英國越可爾巴福斯 霍爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1385年享年37歲。

zh-hans.Witton, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德維頓 小絲
zh-hans.Felton, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德費爾頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Atholl于大约1350年出生在英国諾圖波藍德費爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Adomar Strathbogie40岁，母亲Mary15岁。她于1372年5月6日之前与Sir Ralph Eure在英国越可爾巴福斯 霍爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1385年享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Atholl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Athol
meanings: Scottish: A male name derived from Athol, in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Atholl was born about 1350, in Felton, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Adomar Strathbogie, was 40 and her mother, Mary, was 15. She married Sir Ralph Eure before 6 May 1372, in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1385, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Atholl est née environ 1350, à Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adomar Strathbogie, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Eure avant 6 mai 1372, à Barforth Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1385, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Atholl um 1350 in Felton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adomar Strathbogie 40 und ihre Mutter Mary 15. Sie hat vor 6. Mai 1372 in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England Sir Ralph Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1385 im Alter von 37 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Atholl è nata il circa 1350 nel Felton, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Adomar Strathbogie, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Eure prima del 6 maggio 1372, nel Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1385, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.Witton, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドウィットオン シュエルズ
ja.Felton, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドフエルトン
ja.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストル
ja.Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアバーフォース ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Athollが約1350年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Adomar Strathbogieは40歳，母Maryは15歳であった。1372年5月6日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーフォース ハルでSir Ralph Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1385年に37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Atholl(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 노르스벌랜드 프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adomar Strathbogie(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1372년 5월 6일 이전 영국 요르크실르 바포스 홀에서 Sir Ralph Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1350–about 1385: tany ho any amin'ny 1350–tany ho any amin'ny 1385

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Atholl nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adomar Strathbogie, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Eure antes 6 de maio de 1372, em Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1385, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Atholl родилась около 1350 г. в местности фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Adomar Strathbogie было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Eure перед 6 май 1372 г. в местности барфорт холл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1385 г. в возрасте 37 лет.

sm.about 1350–about 1385: e tusa o le 1350–e tusa o le 1385

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Atholl nació aproximadamente 1350, en Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adomar Strathbogie, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Eure antes de 6 de mayo de 1372, en Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1385, a la edad de 37 años.
